scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend-admin run build && npm --prefix frontend-mobile run build
scripts.verify:delivery: npm run check-encoding && npm test && npm run build
scripts.test: node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/customer-master.test.mjs tests/supplier-master.test.mjs tests/product-master.test.mjs tests/production-picking.test.mjs tests/production-inbound.test.mjs tests/production-report.test.mjs tests/production-board.test.mjs tests/quality-board.test.mjs tests/integration-center.test.mjs tests/system-config.test.mjs tests/cloud-ops.test.mjs tests/notification-center.test.mjs tests/system-logs.test.mjs tests/productization-core.test.mjs tests/injection-process.test.mjs tests/injection-site-flow.test.mjs tests/injection-traceability.test.mjs tests/mobile-injection.test.mjs tests/mobile-production-report.test.mjs tests/mobile-stock-transfer.test.mjs tests/mobile-qc-record.test.mjs tests/mobile-stock-query.test.mjs tests/mobile-inventory-check.test.mjs tests/mobile-efficiency.test.mjs tests/stock-inventory.test.mjs tests/stock-ledger.test.mjs tests/stock-transfer.test.mjs tests/boss-dashboard.test.mjs tests/business-warning.test.mjs tests/purchase-inbound.test.mjs tests/sale-order.test.mjs tests/sale-shipment.test.mjs tests/sale-payment.test.mjs tests/sale-delivery.test.mjs tests/finance-expense.test.mjs tests/finance-receivable.test.mjs tests/finance-statement.test.mjs tests/salary-monthly.test.mjs tests/salary-price.test.mjs
